name: Cornsticks (Dupree)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 450 degrees. Pantry note: cornmeal from a mix or use self-rising cornmeal.
Pour the shortening into a cast-iron cornstick mold or 10-inch skillet. Place the mold in the hot oven.
In a bowl, combine the self-rising cornmeal or mix with milk and egg. Add fennel seed and pepper, stirring until well blended.
Stir in the hot shortening from the mold, then pour the batter into the mold.
Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until done. Serve immediately with butter.
